recent_examples.title: The Economic Incentive Gateway
recent_examples.idea: Technical products fail not because they're too hard, but because they lack immediate economic motivation. The learning curve is acceptable when the payoff is clear and personal.

recent_examples.title: Learning as Byproduct, Not Goal
recent_examples.idea: People don't want to learn tools; they want outcomes. The best education happens when learning is a side effect of building something useful.
